items.name_en: Midnight Black Mimi🚩🚩🚩OHANEL Suede🤩 Classic New Style, New CF Hidden Style🙈 Was I really captivated at first glance? I just 🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and timeless 💖 What's special is that usually shoulder straps are cowhide with chains, this black leather strap is more high-end and retro, a trendy item! Size: 25cm! Small 20cm

This CarryAll Small Tote is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing the elegant style of the LV Milky Way series. Metal hardware and a removable nameplate add a sophisticated touch, while the interior pocket securely stores valuables. It can be carried by hand or worn on the shoulder for more carrying options.

(Height x Width x Length)

Calfskin trim
Fabric lining

This Nano Madeleine is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, returning to the new season with a sophisticated two-tone look. The neat interior includes a patch pocket and card slots, adding functional design to the compact structure. A glossy S-Lock clasp and a removable chain strap mark the brand identity.

items.name_en: Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Shot] Dynamic Chip M13089 White Color M12925 Monogram. This All InBB Xph Tote features Monogram canvas paired with glossy metal hardware, highlighting a classic style with the iconic lock and nameplate. The adjustable strap continues the brand's trunk-making heritage, while the leather strap adds options for crossbody and shoulder carrying. The foldable design allows for flexible shape adjustment, and the ample space makes it a great daily choice.
items.name_cn:

Size: 16x18x12cm
